title: Update to benefit from Go 1.16
body:
After https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1176 requiring Go 1.16, Skopeo will effectively require Go 1.16 as soon as it updates to that version of c/storage; so, update as well.

This is mostly trivial updates to remove references `io/ioutil`, along with a few very small optimizations (`ReadDir` and `WalkDir` not calling `lstat(2)` on every entry).
